phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è una buona trattoria qui?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH OO-nah BWOH-nah trat-toh-REE-ah KWEE

likely_response.translation_en: In the square, on the left.

responses.english: In the square, on the left.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora aprono i ristoranti?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh, ah kay OR-ah AH-proh-noh ee ree-stoh-RAHN-tee

likely_response.local: I ristoranti aprono dalle venti in poi.
likely_response.pronunciation: EE ree-stoh-RAHN-tee ahp-ROH-noh DAHL-leh VEHN-tee EEN POH-ee
likely_response.translation_en: The restaurants open from eight pm onwards.

responses.english: The restaurants open from eight pm onwards.
responses.phonetic: EE ree-stoh-RAHN-tee ahp-ROH-noh DAHL-leh VEHN-tee EEN POH-ee
responses.french: I ristoranti aprono dalle venti in poi.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il menu fisso?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah eel meh-NOO FEE-soh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the menu.

responses.english: It is indicated on the menu.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, avete un tavolo per due?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah-VEH-teh oon TAH-vo-loh per DOO-eh

likely_response.translation_en: Only at the bar, I'm sorry.

responses.english: Only at the bar, I'm sorry.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si prenota un tavolo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see pre-NOH-tah oon TAH-vo-loh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Call the number on the menu.

responses.english: Call the number on the menu.
